testcase.classname: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes parses integer offset strings (dayjs utcOffset)
testcase.name: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes parses integer offset strings (dayjs utcOffset)

testcase.classname: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes treats blank timezone like legacy unary + on empty string (+"" → 0)
testcase.name: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes treats blank timezone like legacy unary + on empty string (+"" → 0)

testcase.classname: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes returns undefined when timezone is absent
testcase.name: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes returns undefined when timezone is absent

testcase.classname: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes resolves a valid IANA zone to an offset in minutes
testcase.name: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes resolves a valid IANA zone to an offset in minutes

testcase.classname: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes returns undefined for invalid IANA identifiers
testcase.name: parseIntegrationTimezoneOffsetMinutes returns undefined for invalid IANA identifiers

testcase.classname: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) getMissingQueuePostsPublishDateWindowUtc uses UTC now − 2h .. now + 2h (symmetric window)
testcase.name: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) getMissingQueuePostsPublishDateWindowUtc uses UTC now − 2h .. now + 2h (symmetric window)

testcase.classname: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) getMissingQueuePostsPublishDateWindowUtc documents: a QUEUE post due 3h ago is outside the recovery window (not selected)
testcase.name: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) getMissingQueuePostsPublishDateWindowUtc documents: a QUEUE post due 3h ago is outside the recovery window (not selected)

testcase.classname: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription does not block when Stripe is not configured
testcase.name: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription does not block when Stripe is not configured

testcase.classname: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription blocks when Stripe is configured and there is no subscription (workflow sees empty list)
testcase.name: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription blocks when Stripe is configured and there is no subscription (workflow sees empty list)

testcase.classname: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription does not block when Stripe is configured and a subscription exists
testcase.name: post scheduling baseline (upstream Postiz main) orchestratorGetPostsListBlockedBySubscription does not block when Stripe is configured and a subscription exists
